description: An automated motion alert triggered on the 'Parking Lot Camera'. Before escalating to law enforcement, management needs a human review. Review the footage in the Nx Witness player and provide a determination report at /home/ga/alarm_review.txt. The report must include: (a) whether suspicious or criminal activity is present, (b) the activity that likely triggered the motion alert, and (c) a recommendation to 'ESCALATE' or 'DISMISS' with justification.
